description_long: This house features a single-story, rectangular layout with a flat white roof and dark brown brick exterior walls. Multiple windows are distributed along each facade, providing ample natural light to the interior rooms. The structure includes a main section and an attached extension, likely serving as a garage or utility space, both accessible via distinct doors. The house sits on a green base, simulating a lawn or yard, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The main entryway is simple, with a plain door and no visible porch or decorative elements. The overall design is functional and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed house with dark brown brick walls, white roof, and multiple symmetrically arranged windows. Includes a main section and an attached extension, likely a garage, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear and side of the house, highlighting the attached extension and several windows on the brown brick walls.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the main entry door, symmetrical window arrangement, and the green lawn base.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the narrower side of the house, emphasizing the depth of the structure and the window placement on the side wall.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the back of the house, the large white roof, and the garage or extension with a wide door.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or decorative elements, flush with the facade
